title: erigeron guatemalensis
intro: Erigeron guatemalensis, also known as Guatemalan fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. Erigeron guatemalensis can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment to harness its health benefits, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine.
